title: Synergy: A company plans to acquire another firm for 50 million,...
summary: Calculate the effective acquisition cost by subtracting expected synergies from the purchase price.
prompt: A company plans to acquire another firm for $50 million, with expected synergies of $10 million. What is the effective cost of the acquisition when considering these synergies?
solution: Effective Cost = Acquisition Price - Synergies = $50 million - $10 million = $40 million.
